analysis_method.description: Name of the method used to analyse simulation.

analysis_software.description: Name of software used to analyse simulation.

analysis_tool.description: Name of the tool used to analyse simulation.

AnalysisMethod.description: Methods used to analyse simulation outputs.
AnalysisMethod.title: AnalysisMethod

AnalysisSoftware.description: Software used to analyse simulation outputs.
AnalysisSoftware.title: AnalysisSoftware

AnalysisTool.description: Tools used to analyse simulation outputs.
AnalysisTool.title: AnalysisTool

Barostat.description: Settings used for the simulation barostat.

barostat_algorithm.description: List of barostat algorithms used in the simulation.

compressibility.description: Compressibility of the simulated system, given as a float.

compressibility_vector.description: Compressibility of the simulated system, given as a float.

pressure_coupling_frequency.description: Step frequency to apply the barostat.

pressure_coupling_type.description: List of coupling types for adjusting box vectors.

pressure_time_constant.description: Time constant/step (relaxation time of pressure) used for coupling the system pressure, given as a float.

target_pressure.description: Target/reference pressure set to reach in the simulation, given as a float.

target_pressure_vector.description: Target/reference pressure set to reach in the simulation, given as a 3x3 array.

Barostat.title: Barostat

BarostatAlgorithm.description: Barostat algorithm used to set the pressure in a simulation.
BarostatAlgorithm.title: BarostatAlgorithm

BondLengthConstraintsAlgorithm.description: Fix specific molecular degrees of freedom—typically fast bond vibrations involving hydrogen atoms. By eliminating these high-frequency motions, constraints allow for larger integration time steps (e.g., 2 fs instead of 0.5 fs), significantly speeding up simulations without disrupting system dynamics.
BondLengthConstraintsAlgorithm.title: BondLengthConstraintsAlgorithm

BoxType.description: Types of box used to simulate the system.
BoxType.title: BoxType

carbohydrate_potential_name.description: Force field used to describe carbohydrate.

modified.description: Has the initial model been modified from the original?

CarbohydratePotentialName.description: Force fields used to parametrize carbohydrates in a simulation.
CarbohydratePotentialName.title: CarbohydratePotentialName

CompressibilityUnit.description: measures how the system volume responds to pressure changes.
CompressibilityUnit.title: CompressibilityUnit

ComputationalEnvironment.description: Computational environment used to perform simulation.

hardware.description: Computer hardware used to perform simulation.

software.description: Computer software used to perform simulation.

ComputationalEnvironment.title: ComputationalEnvironment

Connectivity.description: Connectivity information included in the topology.

bonds.description: Are bond parameters present in the topology?

dihedrals.description: Are dihedral parameters present in the topology?

Connectivity.title: Connectivity

ContainerRuntime.description: Container runtime used to package and run software.
ContainerRuntime.title: ContainerRuntime

CpuArchitecture.description: CPU architecture used by the compute nodes.
CpuArchitecture.title: CpuArchitecture

CpuVendor.description: Vendor of the CPU used in the compute nodes.
CpuVendor.title: CpuVendor

ensemble_type.description: List of ensemble types used in the simulation.

random_seed.description: Random number used to set (a) distribution of velocities across particles at the start of a simulation and (b) pseudo-random values for dynamics/couplings, given as an integer.

simulation_software.description: Name of software used to perform simulation step.

ExecutionPlatform.description: Type of platform used to run the simulation.
ExecutionPlatform.title: ExecutionPlatform

FrictionCoefficientUnit.description: Relationship between applied forces and the resulting resistance to motion.
FrictionCoefficientUnit.title: FrictionCoefficientUnit

general_potential_name.description: Force field used to describe molecules.

modified.description: Has the initial model been modified from the original?

GeneralPotentialName.description: Force fields used to parametrize molecules in a simulation.
GeneralPotentialName.title: GeneralPotentialName

GpuVendor.description: Vendor of the GPU used in the compute nodes.
GpuVendor.title: GpuVendor

Hardware.description: Computer hardware used to perform simulation.

CPU_architecture.description: CPU instruction-set architecture of the compute nodes.

CPU_vendor.description: CPU vendor used in the compute nodes.

GPU_vendor.description: GPU vendor used by the compute nodes, if applicable.

GPUs_per_node.description: Number of GPUs present in each compute node.

cores_per_socket.description: Number of physical CPU cores in each socket.

execution_platform.description: Broad type of system used to run the simulation workload.

memory_per_node.description: Amount of memory installed per compute node.

node_count.description: Number of compute nodes used for the run.

node_type.description: Compute node profile used for the simulation run.

sockets_per_node.description: Number of physical CPU sockets in each compute node.

threads_per_core.description: Number of hardware threads per physical core.

Hardware.title: Hardware

Integrator.description: Settings used for the simulation integrator.

frame_step.description: Time between saved snapshots/frames in a simulation, given as a float.

integrator_algorithm.description: List of integrator algorithms used to integrate the simulation.

number_of_steps.description: Number of integration steps performed in the simulation, given as an integer.

simulation_time.description: Total time molecular dynamics have been sampled in a simulation trajectory, often given by the number of integration steps multiplied by the simulation time step used by the integrator, given as a float.

time_step.description: Time between integration steps in a simulation, given as a float.

Integrator.title: Integrator

IntegratorAlgorithm.description: Algorithm used to integrate the simulation.
IntegratorAlgorithm.title: IntegratorAlgorithm

Interactions.description: Settings used to define particle interactions.

bond_length_constraints_algorithm.description: Constraints applied to bonds between two particles in the simulated system.

electrostatic_cutoff_distance.description: Distance in Angstrom at which a electrostatic interaction is turned off and a long-range non-bonded method is turned on, given as a float.

long_range_interaction_method.description: Method used to describe long-range interactions between particles.

restraints.description: Are any positional restraints applied to molecule dynamics? (Restraints usually use harmonic potentials to keep a value near a target).

vdw_cutoff_distance.description: Distance in Angstrom at which a Van der Waals interaction is turned off and a long-range non-bonded method is turned on.

Interactions.title: Interactions

lipid_potential_name.description: Force field used to describe lipids.

modified.description: Has the initial model been modified from the original?

LipidPotentialName.description: Force fields used to parametrize lipids in a simulation.
LipidPotentialName.title: LipidPotentialName

LongRangeInteractionMethod.description: Method used to implement long-range interactions of point charges in the simulation.
LongRangeInteractionMethod.title: LongRangeInteractionMethod

MPILibrary.description: MPI implementation used for message passing.
MPILibrary.title: MPILibrary

MachineLearnedPotential.description: Machine learned potential used for molecules.

machine_learned_potential_name.description: ML force field used to describe molecules.

modified.description: Has the initial model been modified from the original?

MachineLearnedPotential.title: MachineLearnedPotential

MatrixCompressibilityQuantity.description: A quantity representing compressibility vectors in 3D.
MatrixCompressibilityQuantity.title: MatrixCompressibilityQuantity

MatrixPressureQuantity.description: A quantity representing pressure vectors in 3D.
MatrixPressureQuantity.title: MatrixPressureQuantity

MatrixQuantity.description: A quantity representing general vectors in 3D.
MatrixQuantity.title: MatrixQuantity

energy_tolerance.description: Tolerance energy for when minimization stops, this is when the maximum force on any atom is less than this value (default is often 1000 kJ/mol/nm or 10−4kcal), given as a float.

minimisation_algorithm.description: Name of the method used to minimise the molecular system.

minimisation_distance_step_size.description: The distance the algorithm moves in a single step, controls how large a step the optimizer takes during the initial phase of minimizing the potential energy of a structure, given as a float.

number_of_minimisation_steps.description: Number of integration steps performed during minimisation of the system, given as an integer.

simulation_software.description: Name of software used to perform simulation step.

MinimisationAlgorithm.description: Algorithm used to minimise particle interactions.
MinimisationAlgorithm.title: MinimisationAlgorithm

MoleculeID.description: Identifiers of a molecule type in the simulated system.

InChI.description: The International Chemical Identifier (InChi) is a textual identifier for chemical substances, designed to provide a standard way to encode molecular information

InChIKey.description: The condensed, 27 character InChIKey, which is a hashed version of the full InChI (using the SHA-256 algorithm), designed to allow for easy web searches of chemical compounds.

PubChem_CID.description: PubChem CID of chemical molecules and their activities against biological assays.

SMILES.description: Simplified Molecular Input Line Entry System (SMILES) ASCII-based line notation used to describe chemical structures. It represents molecular graphs with atoms and bonds, allowing software to convert these short strings into 2D or 3D models.

alphafold_ID.description: AlphaFold predicted protein structure identifier (AlphaFold DB, EMBL-EBI)

atom_count.description: Number of atoms in a molecule.

modified.description: Has the initial model been modified from the original?

molecular_formula.description: The molecular formula of a molecule\

molecular_weight.description: The molecular weight of a molecule.

molecule_count.description: Number of instances of a given molecule, defined as bonded atoms or beads.

monomer_count.description: Number of monomeric units in a polymer(e.g. protein or nucleic acid).

nucleic_sequence.description: One letter sequence for nucleic acid nucleotides.

predicted_structure.description: Are the molecule positions derived from a prediction?

protein_sequence.description: One letter sequence for protein amino acids.

MoleculeID.title: MoleculeID

NodeType.description: Type of compute node used in the system.
NodeType.title: NodeType

NucleicPotential.description: Potential used for nucleic acid molecules.

modified.description: Has the initial model been modified from the original?

nucleic_potential_name.description: Force field used to describe nucleic acids.

NucleicPotential.title: NucleicPotential

NucleicPotentialName.description: Force fields used to parametrize nucleic acids in a simulation.
NucleicPotentialName.title: NucleicPotentialName

OperatingSystem.description: List of operating systems installed on the hardware used to perform the simulation.
OperatingSystem.title: OperatingSystem

Particles.description: Particle information included in the topology.

fixed_charges.description: Are fixed charges on atoms included in the topology?

masses.description: Are masses present in the topology?

system_charge.description: Total electrostatic charge of the system given by the elementary charge (e).

Particles.title: Particles

energy_consumption.description: Total energy consumed by the simulation run.

wall_time.description: Total elapsed runtime of the simulation.

PeriodicBoundaryConditions.description: What directions in a simulation cell periodic boundaries are set if they are turned on.
PeriodicBoundaryConditions.title: PeriodicBoundaryConditions

modified.description: Has the initial model been modified from the original?

polymer_potential_name.description: Force field used to describe polymers (excluding proteins and nucleic acids).

PolymerPotentialName.description: Force fields used to parametrize polymers in a simulation.
PolymerPotentialName.title: PolymerPotentialName

PotentialMetadata.description: Potentials used for various modelled molecules.

machine_learned_potential.description: ML force field for molecules (in general).

polymer_potential.description: Force field for polymers (excluding proteins and nucleic acids).

PotentialMetadata.title: PotentialMetadata

PressureCouplingType.description: Coupling type for adjusting box vectors.
PressureCouplingType.title: PressureCouplingType

simulation_software.description: Name of software used to perform simulation step.

simulation_software_version.description: Version of software used to perform simulation step.

modified.description: Has the initial model been modified from the original?

protein_potential_name.description: Force field used to describe proteins.

ProteinPotentialName.description: Force fields used to parametrize amino acids in proteins in a simulation.
ProteinPotentialName.title: ProteinPotentialName

Scheduler.description: Job scheduler used for simulation execution.
Scheduler.title: Scheduler

setup_tool.description: Name of the tool used to setup simulation.

SetupTool.description: Tool used to setup a system for simulation.
SetupTool.title: SetupTool

SimulationAverages.description: Average values of observables outputted from the simulation.

average_enthalpy.description: Average enthalpy sampled from the simulation, given as a float.

average_kinetic_energy.description: Average kinetic energy sampled from the simulation, given as a float.

average_potential_energy.description: Average potential energy sampled from the simulation, given as a float.

average_pressure.description: Average pressure sampled from the simulation, given as a float.

average_temperature.description: Average temperature sampled from the simulation, given as a float.

average_volume.description: Average volume sampled from the simulation, given as a float.

average_volume_vector.description: Average volume sampled from the simulation, given as a list, (e.g. 10, 10, 10).

SimulationAverages.title: SimulationAverages

box_angles.description: The angles of the box used to simulate the system.

box_dimensions.description: The lengths/dimensions of the box used to simulate the system.

box_type.description: The type of box used to simuluate the system.

periodic_boundary_conditions.description: What directions in a simulation cell periodic boundaries are set if they are turned on.

potentials.description: Force field potentials used to describe simulated particles.

simulation_averages.description: Average values of observables outputted from the simulation.

SimulationSoftware.description: Simulation software used to perform molecular dynamics simulations and related functions.
SimulationSoftware.title: SimulationSoftware

SimulationTool.description: Tools/utility used within simulation engines to perform simulations.
SimulationTool.title: SimulationTool

Software.description: Computer software used to perform simulation.

MPI_library.description: MPI implementation used for distributed parallel execution.

container_runtime.description: Container runtime used to execute the simulation environment, if any.

operating_system.description: Operating system installed on the hardware used to perform the simulation.

scheduler.description: Workload manager or job scheduler used to launch the simulation.

Software.title: Software

molecule_ID.description: Persistent identifier of a molecule being simulated.

system_counts.description: Entity counts across the simulated system.

SystemCounts.description: Entity counts across the simulated system.

salt_concentration.description: Concentration of salt in the solution.

total_atom_count.description: Total number of atoms in the simulation.

total_molecule_count.description: Total number of simulated molecules, defined as bonded atoms or beads.

unique_molecule_count.description: Number of unique simulated molecules, defined as bonded atoms or beads.

SystemCounts.title: SystemCounts

Thermostat.description: Settings used for the simulation thermostat.

chain_length.description: Usually required in the Nosé-Hoover thermostat, the chain length (e.g., nh-chain-length in GROMACS) is used to maintain canonical distribution, given as an integer.

collision_frequency.description: Collision frequency for the integrator, given as a float.

coupling_group.description: A subset of atoms for which temperature is controlled, often needed for simulating complex systems (e.g., protein in water), used in gromacs, given as a string

friction_coefficient.description: Usually used in the Langevin thermostat, the friction coefficient determines the strength of coupling between a system and a heat bath, given as a float.

target_temperature.description: Target/reference temperature set to reach in the simulation, given as a float.

target_temperature_vector.description: Target/reference temperature set to reach in the simulation, given as a list (e.g. 300, 300).

temperature_time_constant.description: Time constant for coupling the system temperature in seconds units, given as a list (e.g. 0.1, 0.1).

thermostat_algorithm.description: List of thermostat algorithms used in the simulation.

Thermostat.title: Thermostat

ThermostatAlgorithm.description: Thermostat algorithm used to set the temperature in a simulation.
ThermostatAlgorithm.title: ThermostatAlgorithm

energies.description: Are per-frame energies included in the trajectory?

forces.description: Are per-frame forces included in the trajectory?

frame_count.description: Total number of snapshots that make up a trajectory.

polarizable_charges.description: Are per-frame polarizable charges included in the trajectory?

positions.description: Are per-frame positions included in the trajectory?

replica.description: Is this trajectory a replica of another provided trajectory?

velocities.description: Are per-frame velocities included in the trajectory?

water.description: Are water molecules included in the trajectory?

VectorTemperatureQuantity.description: Temperature values for multiple coupling groups.
VectorTemperatureQuantity.title: VectorTemperatureQuantity

VectorTimeQuantity.description: Time values for multiple coupling groups.
VectorTimeQuantity.title: VectorTimeQuantity

VectorVolumeQuantity.description: A quantity representing volume as via 3 length dimensions.
VectorVolumeQuantity.title: VectorVolumeQuantity

modified.description: Has the initial model been modified from the original?

water_potential_name.description: Force field used to describe water molecules.

WaterPotentialName.description: Force fields used to parametrize water molecules in a simulation.
WaterPotentialName.title: WaterPotentialName

potentials.description: Force field potentials used to describe simulated particles.
